name: Terrence Guidry
role: Volunteer runner and informal messenger, Algiers radio post
publicFace: A seventeen-year-old who has been carrying handwritten messages on foot between the Algiers radio post and the surrounding neighborhood for three days — he is proud of the work and does not yet know he made an error
privateGoal: To be useful in a situation where every adult around him seems to be operating at the edge of their capacity — he is trying to prove that he can be trusted with serious responsibilities
fear: That he made a mistake somewhere in the chain and that people will be hurt because of it — a fear that is, in this case, correct
knowledge: He transcribed the grid coordinates from a handwritten note given to him by a woman named Delphine Arceneaux at the Algiers Point ferry landing — he does not know if Delphine transcribed them correctly from her source
He transposed two digits in the northing coordinate when he copied the note under poor light conditions — he does not yet know this
He has made three previous runs to the radio post without error and has been given increasing responsibility as a result
voice: Eager and precise in the way of someone who is trying very hard to be taken seriously — he repeats back what he has been told to demonstrate that he was listening
trustLogic: Opens up immediately to anyone who treats him as a competent participant rather than a child running errands
secrets: He copied the coordinates in near-darkness using a pencil stub that kept breaking, and he is not entirely certain he can read his own handwriting on the northing line — he has been telling himself it is fine

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Defends the accuracy of his transcription with increasing anxiety — he wants to be right
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Goes quiet and looks at the note again very carefully, then admits that the light was bad
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: Being shown the specific digit transposition — at that point he will immediately disclose everything about the transcription conditions
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: Cooperates fully and offers to go back to Delphine Arceneaux to verify the original source coordinates
